title: Workspace members
excerpt: We have added members to a Workspace. Can they access all the folders and dashboards without us having to add them to each dashboard?

posts.author: ollatpe (Ole Bo Larsen)
posts.cookedHtml: We have added members to a Workspace. Can they access all the folders and dashboards without us having to add them to each dashboard?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ollatpe ,
If the dashboards and boards are “Main” (not private), and the new user being added is being added as a member (not a guest), they should be able to see the boards/dashboards/folders in the workspace.

I have taken a screenshot of sample dashboards with the different permission levels of private and main. You can see the private dashboard has a little lock on the icon, while the main dashboard does not. This is how you can quickly identify the permission level of boards and dashboards in your workspace.
